summary: Live Route Monitoring feature fully tested - all backend API endpoints working, frontend UI with Mapbox visualization working. Corridor generation using Shapely produces valid GeoJSON polygon. On-route/off-route detection, escalation logic, trail tracking, session management all verified.

backend_api.POST /api/route-monitor/start: PASS - Returns corridor polygon, corridor_width_m, status=monitoring
backend_api.GET /api/route-monitor/session (active): PASS - Returns status=active, mode, escalation_level, trail_length
backend_api.Escalation L1 trigger: PASS - Triggers after 2 consecutive off-route checks >10s
backend_api.Back on track resets escalation: PASS - Escalation resets to 0 on return to corridor
backend_api.POST /api/route-monitor/stop: PASS - Returns total_trail_points, max_escalation, total_deviations, max_distance_m, duration_s

frontend_ui.nav-route-monitor: PASS - Route Monitor nav item in sidebar
frontend_ui.route-monitor-map: PASS - Mapbox dark-v11 map renders (Mumbai center)
frontend_ui.monitoring-status-card: PASS - Shows Status, Escalation, Trail Points, Mode
frontend_ui.start-monitor-btn: PASS - Starts monitoring, draws corridor on map
frontend_ui.last-update-card: PASS - Shows In Corridor, Route Distance, Off Duration, Area Risk
frontend_ui.escalation-levels-guide: PASS - L1 Warning, L2 Alert, L3 Emergency thresholds
frontend_ui.map-corridor-polygon: PASS - Green corridor polygon drawn using GeoJSON
frontend_ui.map-deviation-marker: PASS - Red deviation marker when off-route
frontend_ui.map-legend: PASS - Legend shows Planned Route, Safe Corridor, User Trail, Deviation Point

critical_code_review_comments: Route monitor service uses in-memory fallback (_mem_store) when Redis unavailable - appropriate for preview environment
Corridor generation uses Shapely library for accurate polygon buffering
Escalation logic requires CONSECUTIVE_OFF_TRIGGER=2 off-route checks before triggering
SSE events (route_warning, route_alert, route_emergency, route_back_on_track) are emitted per escalation level
context_for_next_testing_agent: Live Route Monitoring feature fully tested. All 4 API endpoints working: /start, /session, /location, /stop. Frontend RouteMonitorPage renders Mapbox map with corridor polygon, start/destination markers, user trail, deviation markers. Simulation buttons (On Route / Deviate) work correctly. Last Update card shows corridor status. Escalation levels guide displayed. Redis unavailable in preview - uses in-memory fallback.

mocked_apis_list: Redis not running - in-memory fallback for route session storage (intentional design)

verified_features.corridor_generation: Working - Shapely generates valid GeoJSON polygon with configurable width per mode
verified_features.off_route_detection: Working - Returns inside_corridor=false with distance in meters
verified_features.back_on_track_reset: Working - Escalation resets to 0 when user returns to corridor
verified_features.trail_tracking: Working - Trail accumulates GPS points, max 200
verified_features.mapbox_visualization: Working - Dark theme map, corridor polygon, user trail, markers
verified_features.simulation_controls: Working - On Route and Deviate buttons function correctly
verified_features.last_update_card: Working - Shows In Corridor, Route Distance, Off Duration, Area Risk
